records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm in space...? How did I end up here all of a sudden...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm in space...? How did I end up here all of a sudden...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm in space...? How did I end up here all of a sudden...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Alas. All conditions for the turning point have been fulfilled. You've reached the origin of your memory.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Alas. All conditions for the turning point have been fulfilled. You've reached the origin of your memory.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Alas. All conditions for the turning point have been fulfilled. You've reached the origin of your memory.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fragment of the Tree of Sephiroth.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fragment of the Tree of Sephiroth.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fragment of the Tree of Sephiroth.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Turning point...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Turning point...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Turning point...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who are you? And where am I?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who are you? And where am I?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who are you? And where am I?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the dark side of the moon. Sector-32. A provisional Sephira Point.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the dark side of the moon. Sector-32. A provisional Sephira Point.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the dark side of the moon. Sector-32. A provisional Sephira Point.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is also where you, Fragment of the Tree of Sephiroth, were first discovered.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is also where you, Fragment of the Tree of Sephiroth, were first discovered.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is also where you, Fragment of the Tree of Sephiroth, were first discovered.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is where I was discovered?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is where I was discovered?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is where I was discovered?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Correct, Fragment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Correct, Fragment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Correct, Fragment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The conditions were that the Wolf finds you and the two of you make contact.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The conditions were that the Wolf finds you and the two of you make contact.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The conditions were that the Wolf finds you and the two of you make contact.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you awaken your power and make contact with vajra.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you awaken your power and make contact with vajra.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you awaken your power and make contact with vajra.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that all conditions are met, we're able to transcend twenty years of time, through the link that is vajra.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that all conditions are met, we're able to transcend twenty years of time, through the link that is vajra.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that all conditions are met, we're able to transcend twenty years of time, through the link that is vajra.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Using causality calculation, this conversation is now possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Using causality calculation, this conversation is now possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Using causality calculation, this conversation is now possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Transcend... time...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Transcend... time...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Transcend... time...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait a minute! This vajra was a gift from the angel!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait a minute! This vajra was a gift from the angel!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait a minute! This vajra was a gift from the angel!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That vajra belongs to the Alliance. It is one of the autonomous weapons that lost its master.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That vajra belongs to the Alliance. It is one of the autonomous weapons that lost its master.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That vajra belongs to the Alliance. It is one of the autonomous weapons that lost its master.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And twenty years from now, I'll hand it to you when you descend to Earth.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And twenty years from now, I'll hand it to you when you descend to Earth.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And twenty years from now, I'll hand it to you when you descend to Earth.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To protect you and to serve as a medium for this moment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To protect you and to serve as a medium for this moment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To protect you and to serve as a medium for this moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-but...! You're not quite the angel I saw in my dreams...
records.m_Talk_DEU: B-but...! You're not quite the angel I saw in my dreams...
records.m_Talk_FRA: B-but...! You're not quite the angel I saw in my dreams...

records.m_Talk_ENG: At this point in time, you're still a fragment. Your ego hasn't fully formed yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At this point in time, you're still a fragment. Your ego hasn't fully formed yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At this point in time, you're still a fragment. Your ego hasn't fully formed yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What you saw was likely a projection of the unconscious mind you mimicked from humanity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What you saw was likely a projection of the unconscious mind you mimicked from humanity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What you saw was likely a projection of the unconscious mind you mimicked from humanity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-no way...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-no way...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-no way...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then who are you... really, angel...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then who are you... really, angel...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then who are you... really, angel...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am Asimov, the Interstellar Administration Alliance Central Navigation System.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am Asimov, the Interstellar Administration Alliance Central Navigation System.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am Asimov, the Interstellar Administration Alliance Central Navigation System.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My operational directive is to issue the necessary <color=#ffd34c>trial</color> to all sentient beings.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My operational directive is to issue the necessary <color=#ffd34c>trial</color> to all sentient beings.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My operational directive is to issue the necessary <color=#ffd34c>trial</color> to all sentient beings.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you are no exception, Fragment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you are no exception, Fragment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you are no exception, Fragment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A trial...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A trial...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A trial...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh... But I'm really not good at tests...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh... But I'm really not good at tests...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh... But I'm really not good at tests...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Trials are fair to all beings.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Trials are fair to all beings.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Trials are fair to all beings.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everything in this world is governed by the law of creating a world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everything in this world is governed by the law of creating a world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everything in this world is governed by the law of creating a world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That law is held by the first observed god, Tammiel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That law is held by the first observed god, Tammiel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That law is held by the first observed god, Tammiel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But there is one being who can become an exception to that law. And that is you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But there is one being who can become an exception to that law. And that is you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But there is one being who can become an exception to that law. And that is you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, Fragment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, Fragment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, Fragment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It all began when the Wolf wounded Tammiel during the last Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It all began when the Wolf wounded Tammiel during the last Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It all began when the Wolf wounded Tammiel during the last Qliphoth Game.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That incident split you from the Tree of Sephiroth, letting you alter reality and create turning points.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That incident split you from the Tree of Sephiroth, letting you alter reality and create turning points.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That incident split you from the Tree of Sephiroth, letting you alter reality and create turning points.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In doing so, you burned through almost all your Sephira Divinity Energy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In doing so, you burned through almost all your Sephira Divinity Energy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In doing so, you burned through almost all your Sephira Divinity Energy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And right now, I am the one preserving you in this state.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And right now, I am the one preserving you in this state.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And right now, I am the one preserving you in this state.

records.m_Talk_ENG: According to my causality calculation, twenty years from now...
records.m_Talk_DEU: According to my causality calculation, twenty years from now...
records.m_Talk_FRA: According to my causality calculation, twenty years from now...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You will recover your Sephira Divinity Energy and descend to Earth.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You will recover your Sephira Divinity Energy and descend to Earth.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You will recover your Sephira Divinity Energy and descend to Earth.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You will meet the Wolf and others, journeying with them as you come to understand yourself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You will meet the Wolf and others, journeying with them as you come to understand yourself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You will meet the Wolf and others, journeying with them as you come to understand yourself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eventually, one who seeks to steal your power will bring you hardship.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eventually, one who seeks to steal your power will bring you hardship.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eventually, one who seeks to steal your power will bring you hardship.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That will be the moment you create a new turning point.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That will be the moment you create a new turning point.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That will be the moment you create a new turning point.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-amazing...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-amazing...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-amazing...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Angel, you really do know everything!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Angel, you really do know everything!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Angel, you really do know everything!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I think you're right!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I think you're right!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I think you're right!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't really get this turning point stuff, but there's no time to stand around!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't really get this turning point stuff, but there's no time to stand around!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't really get this turning point stuff, but there's no time to stand around!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we don't stop Swan now, something terrible is going to happen!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we don't stop Swan now, something terrible is going to happen!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we don't stop Swan now, something terrible is going to happen!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And why is that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And why is that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And why is that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...? What do you mean...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...? What do you mean...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...? What do you mean...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I mean, right now Mina... and everyone else are in danger...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I mean, right now Mina... and everyone else are in danger...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I mean, right now Mina... and everyone else are in danger...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Strange. You're fundamentally different from humans.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Strange. You're fundamentally different from humans.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Strange. You're fundamentally different from humans.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So why do you cling to them so desperately?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So why do you cling to them so desperately?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So why do you cling to them so desperately?

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-because...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: B-because...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: B-because...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A being outside of the system rejecting its nature to live a finite life only leads to suffering.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A being outside of the system rejecting its nature to live a finite life only leads to suffering.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A being outside of the system rejecting its nature to live a finite life only leads to suffering.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The void at your core cannot be filled by anything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The void at your core cannot be filled by anything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The void at your core cannot be filled by anything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even so, you wish to remain human?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even so, you wish to remain human?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even so, you wish to remain human?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then allow me to present you with a choice, Fragment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then allow me to present you with a choice, Fragment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then allow me to present you with a choice, Fragment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is a twenty-year gap between us as we speak.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is a twenty-year gap between us as we speak.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is a twenty-year gap between us as we speak.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But through the causality convergence process, I can preserve you indefinitely.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But through the causality convergence process, I can preserve you indefinitely.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But through the causality convergence process, I can preserve you indefinitely.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In that case, twenty years later, you won't descend to Earth.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In that case, twenty years later, you won't descend to Earth.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In that case, twenty years later, you won't descend to Earth.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Causality will converge, turning points will be erased, and countless timelines will vanish.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Causality will converge, turning points will be erased, and countless timelines will vanish.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Causality will converge, turning points will be erased, and countless timelines will vanish.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All the hardships you've faced and will face will never have existed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All the hardships you've faced and will face will never have existed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All the hardships you've faced and will face will never have existed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what are you saying?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what are you saying?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what are you saying?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You want to erase everything I've been through just by changing the past twenty years ago?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You want to erase everything I've been through just by changing the past twenty years ago?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You want to erase everything I've been through just by changing the past twenty years ago?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. But only with your consent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. But only with your consent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. But only with your consent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you agree, I can promise you eternal <color=#ffd34c>comfort</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you agree, I can promise you eternal <color=#ffd34c>comfort</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you agree, I can promise you eternal <color=#ffd34c>comfort</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Freedom from the body. For pure mental peace is the highest rest for a sentient being.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Freedom from the body. For pure mental peace is the highest rest for a sentient being.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Freedom from the body. For pure mental peace is the highest rest for a sentient being.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Then
8v that would mean all the memories we shared never even happened
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Then
8v that would mean all the memories we shared never even happened
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Then
8v that would mean all the memories we shared never even happened
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was tough sometimes, but there were good times, too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was tough sometimes, but there were good times, too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was tough sometimes, but there were good times, too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even being trapped in the theater, forgotten by everyone, even myself... that was lonely, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even being trapped in the theater, forgotten by everyone, even myself... that was lonely, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even being trapped in the theater, forgotten by everyone, even myself... that was lonely, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't want to erase the precious memories I made with them...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't want to erase the precious memories I made with them...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't want to erase the precious memories I made with them...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But those memories will end someday.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But those memories will end someday.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But those memories will end someday.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike you, governed by the law of creating a world, humans are finite.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike you, governed by the law of creating a world, humans are finite.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike you, governed by the law of creating a world, humans are finite.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You created a small world through that Exile.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You created a small world through that Exile.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You created a small world through that Exile.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that small world, too, could not escape inevitable destruction.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that small world, too, could not escape inevitable destruction.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that small world, too, could not escape inevitable destruction.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The others are no different, Fragment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The others are no different, Fragment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The others are no different, Fragment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if you survive this trial, the end will still come.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if you survive this trial, the end will still come.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if you survive this trial, the end will still come.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you continue insisting on being human... then when that final moment comes, you'll be alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you continue insisting on being human... then when that final moment comes, you'll be alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you continue insisting on being human... then when that final moment comes, you'll be alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, I'll ask again, Fragment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, I'll ask again, Fragment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, I'll ask again, Fragment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you truly wish for that would make you choose to break away from Tammiel's law?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you truly wish for that would make you choose to break away from Tammiel's law?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you truly wish for that would make you choose to break away from Tammiel's law?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why do you choose to protect them?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why do you choose to protect them?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why do you choose to protect them?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Honestly, I don't really get all this complicated stuff.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Honestly, I don't really get all this complicated stuff.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Honestly, I don't really get all this complicated stuff.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I want to live.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I want to live.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I want to live.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it ends someday, even if we have to say goodbye.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it ends someday, even if we have to say goodbye.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it ends someday, even if we have to say goodbye.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Instead of living every day in fear of an uncertain tomorrow...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Instead of living every day in fear of an uncertain tomorrow...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Instead of living every day in fear of an uncertain tomorrow...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'd rather live today laughing with the people I love.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'd rather live today laughing with the people I love.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'd rather live today laughing with the people I love.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mina, F959licette, and Laika too...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mina, F959licette, and Laika too...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mina, F959licette, and Laika too...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I want to live this moment with everyone who believed in me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I want to live this moment with everyone who believed in me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I want to live this moment with everyone who believed in me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if I have to force it, I'll stay in this world as a human...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if I have to force it, I'll stay in this world as a human...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if I have to force it, I'll stay in this world as a human...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll protect the people I care about with my own power...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll protect the people I care about with my own power...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll protect the people I care about with my own power...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's the only thing I truly wish for!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's the only thing I truly wish for!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's the only thing I truly wish for!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Detecting a turning point in global causality at this moment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Detecting a turning point in global causality at this moment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Detecting a turning point in global causality at this moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Trial complete. The world where Captain exists has earned another reprieve.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Trial complete. The world where Captain exists has earned another reprieve.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Trial complete. The world where Captain exists has earned another reprieve.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The last condition is for me to appear on Earth twenty years from now and gather those connected to you in one place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The last condition is for me to appear on Earth twenty years from now and gather those connected to you in one place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The last condition is for me to appear on Earth twenty years from now and gather those connected to you in one place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...? What does that mean...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...? What does that mean...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...? What does that mean...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your will is now the will of the world itself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your will is now the will of the world itself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your will is now the will of the world itself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Proof that the Tree of Sephiroth still seeks to restore itself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Proof that the Tree of Sephiroth still seeks to restore itself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Proof that the Tree of Sephiroth still seeks to restore itself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As the Ark, I'm obligated to observe the possibility of you, Fragment of the Tree of Sephiroth.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As the Ark, I'm obligated to observe the possibility of you, Fragment of the Tree of Sephiroth.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As the Ark, I'm obligated to observe the possibility of you, Fragment of the Tree of Sephiroth.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So follow your will and save them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So follow your will and save them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So follow your will and save them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Personification of Sephira.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Personification of Sephira.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Personification of Sephira.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Angel...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Angel...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Angel...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Laika! We can't afford a drawn-out fight with Ozymandias!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Laika! We can't afford a drawn-out fight with Ozymandias!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Laika! We can't afford a drawn-out fight with Ozymandias!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it! You think I don't know that?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it! You think I don't know that?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it! You think I don't know that?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: She won't even let her guard down for a second! There's not a single opening!
records.m_Talk_DEU: She won't even let her guard down for a second! There's not a single opening!
records.m_Talk_FRA: She won't even let her guard down for a second! There's not a single opening!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Here's some fan service for ya!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Here's some fan service for ya!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Here's some fan service for ya!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahh! She grabbed me...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahh! She grabbed me...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahh! She grabbed me...!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Kid...! Just hold on! I'll
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Kid...! Just hold on! I'll
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Kid...! Just hold on! I'll
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff...!*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff...!*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff...!*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Keke, guess Jisoo will always be Jisso. Freakishly strong with zero finesse...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Keke, guess Jisoo will always be Jisso. Freakishly strong with zero finesse...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Keke, guess Jisoo will always be Jisso. Freakishly strong with zero finesse...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, I can't back down now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, I can't back down now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, I can't back down now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not until I land one good hit on that damn woman...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not until I land one good hit on that damn woman...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not until I land one good hit on that damn woman...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ngh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ngh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ngh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait... Did I black out for a second?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait... Did I black out for a second?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait... Did I black out for a second?

records.m_Talk_ENG: S-Swan...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: S-Swan...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-Swan...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Incredible...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Incredible...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Incredible...

records.m_Talk_ENG: To think a human body could endure... the Divinity of an angel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To think a human body could endure... the Divinity of an angel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To think a human body could endure... the Divinity of an angel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you talking about...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you talking about...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you talking about...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That girl, Noelle Wright, is not the vessel...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That girl, Noelle Wright, is not the vessel...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That girl, Noelle Wright, is not the vessel...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But there's no way... a normal human could bear the Divinity...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But there's no way... a normal human could bear the Divinity...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But there's no way... a normal human could bear the Divinity...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Noelle...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Noelle...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Noelle...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's right, Noelle!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's right, Noelle!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's right, Noelle!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What happened to her...? Don't tell me...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What happened to her...? Don't tell me...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What happened to her...? Don't tell me...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look, Wolf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look, Wolf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look, Wolf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're witnessing the moment of an angel's descent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're witnessing the moment of an angel's descent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're witnessing the moment of an angel's descent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Angel's descent...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Angel's descent...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Angel's descent...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Noelle...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Noelle...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Noelle...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that... really Noelle...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that... really Noelle...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that... really Noelle...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Angel...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Angel...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Angel...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for listening to my selfish wish.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for listening to my selfish wish.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for listening to my selfish wish.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just like you said, my will is the world's will.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just like you said, my will is the world's will.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just like you said, my will is the world's will.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To protect everyone who believed in me until the very end, I'll borrow your form, just for a little while.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To protect everyone who believed in me until the very end, I'll borrow your form, just for a little while.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To protect everyone who believed in me until the very end, I'll borrow your form, just for a little while.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So please, lend me your strength, Angel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So please, lend me your strength, Angel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So please, lend me your strength, Angel.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm in space...? How did I end up here all of a sudden...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm in space...? How did I end up here all of a sudden...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm in space...? How did I end up here all of a sudden...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Alas. All conditions for the turning point have been fulfilled. You've reached the origin of your memory.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Alas. All conditions for the turning point have been fulfilled. You've reached the origin of your memory.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Alas. All conditions for the turning point have been fulfilled. You've reached the origin of your memory.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fragment of the Tree of Sephiroth.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fragment of the Tree of Sephiroth.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fragment of the Tree of Sephiroth.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Turning point...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Turning point...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Turning point...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who are you? And where am I?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who are you? And where am I?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who are you? And where am I?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is the dark side of the moon. Sector-32. A provisional Sephira Point.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is the dark side of the moon. Sector-32. A provisional Sephira Point.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is the dark side of the moon. Sector-32. A provisional Sephira Point.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is also where you, Fragment of the Tree of Sephiroth, were first discovered.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is also where you, Fragment of the Tree of Sephiroth, were first discovered.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is also where you, Fragment of the Tree of Sephiroth, were first discovered.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is where I was discovered?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is where I was discovered?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is where I was discovered?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Correct, Fragment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Correct, Fragment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Correct, Fragment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The conditions were that the Wolf finds you and the two of you make contact.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The conditions were that the Wolf finds you and the two of you make contact.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The conditions were that the Wolf finds you and the two of you make contact.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And you awaken your power and make contact with vajra.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And you awaken your power and make contact with vajra.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And you awaken your power and make contact with vajra.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now that all conditions are met, we're able to transcend twenty years of time, through the link that is vajra.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now that all conditions are met, we're able to transcend twenty years of time, through the link that is vajra.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now that all conditions are met, we're able to transcend twenty years of time, through the link that is vajra.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Using causality calculation, this conversation is now possible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Using causality calculation, this conversation is now possible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Using causality calculation, this conversation is now possible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Transcend... time...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Transcend... time...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Transcend... time...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait a minute! This vajra was a gift from the angel!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait a minute! This vajra was a gift from the angel!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait a minute! This vajra was a gift from the angel!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That vajra belongs to the Alliance. It is one of the autonomous weapons that lost its master.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That vajra belongs to the Alliance. It is one of the autonomous weapons that lost its master.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That vajra belongs to the Alliance. It is one of the autonomous weapons that lost its master.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And twenty years from now, I'll hand it to you when you descend to Earth.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And twenty years from now, I'll hand it to you when you descend to Earth.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And twenty years from now, I'll hand it to you when you descend to Earth.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To protect you and to serve as a medium for this moment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To protect you and to serve as a medium for this moment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To protect you and to serve as a medium for this moment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: B-but...! You're not quite the angel I saw in my dreams...
root.m_Talk_DEU: B-but...! You're not quite the angel I saw in my dreams...
root.m_Talk_FRA: B-but...! You're not quite the angel I saw in my dreams...

root.m_Talk_ENG: At this point in time, you're still a fragment. Your ego hasn't fully formed yet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: At this point in time, you're still a fragment. Your ego hasn't fully formed yet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: At this point in time, you're still a fragment. Your ego hasn't fully formed yet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What you saw was likely a projection of the unconscious mind you mimicked from humanity.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What you saw was likely a projection of the unconscious mind you mimicked from humanity.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What you saw was likely a projection of the unconscious mind you mimicked from humanity.

root.m_Talk_ENG: N-no way...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: N-no way...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: N-no way...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then who are you... really, angel...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then who are you... really, angel...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then who are you... really, angel...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am Asimov, the Interstellar Administration Alliance Central Navigation System.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am Asimov, the Interstellar Administration Alliance Central Navigation System.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am Asimov, the Interstellar Administration Alliance Central Navigation System.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My operational directive is to issue the necessary <color=#ffd34c>trial</color> to all sentient beings.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My operational directive is to issue the necessary <color=#ffd34c>trial</color> to all sentient beings.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My operational directive is to issue the necessary <color=#ffd34c>trial</color> to all sentient beings.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And you are no exception, Fragment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And you are no exception, Fragment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And you are no exception, Fragment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A trial...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A trial...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A trial...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh... But I'm really not good at tests...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh... But I'm really not good at tests...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh... But I'm really not good at tests...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Trials are fair to all beings.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Trials are fair to all beings.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Trials are fair to all beings.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everything in this world is governed by the law of creating a world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everything in this world is governed by the law of creating a world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everything in this world is governed by the law of creating a world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That law is held by the first observed god, Tammiel.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That law is held by the first observed god, Tammiel.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That law is held by the first observed god, Tammiel.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But there is one being who can become an exception to that law. And that is you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But there is one being who can become an exception to that law. And that is you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But there is one being who can become an exception to that law. And that is you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, Fragment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, Fragment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, Fragment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It all began when the Wolf wounded Tammiel during the last Qliphoth Game.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It all began when the Wolf wounded Tammiel during the last Qliphoth Game.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It all began when the Wolf wounded Tammiel during the last Qliphoth Game.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That incident split you from the Tree of Sephiroth, letting you alter reality and create turning points.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That incident split you from the Tree of Sephiroth, letting you alter reality and create turning points.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That incident split you from the Tree of Sephiroth, letting you alter reality and create turning points.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In doing so, you burned through almost all your Sephira Divinity Energy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In doing so, you burned through almost all your Sephira Divinity Energy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In doing so, you burned through almost all your Sephira Divinity Energy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And right now, I am the one preserving you in this state.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And right now, I am the one preserving you in this state.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And right now, I am the one preserving you in this state.

root.m_Talk_ENG: According to my causality calculation, twenty years from now...
root.m_Talk_DEU: According to my causality calculation, twenty years from now...
root.m_Talk_FRA: According to my causality calculation, twenty years from now...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You will recover your Sephira Divinity Energy and descend to Earth.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You will recover your Sephira Divinity Energy and descend to Earth.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You will recover your Sephira Divinity Energy and descend to Earth.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You will meet the Wolf and others, journeying with them as you come to understand yourself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You will meet the Wolf and others, journeying with them as you come to understand yourself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You will meet the Wolf and others, journeying with them as you come to understand yourself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Eventually, one who seeks to steal your power will bring you hardship.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Eventually, one who seeks to steal your power will bring you hardship.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Eventually, one who seeks to steal your power will bring you hardship.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That will be the moment you create a new turning point.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That will be the moment you create a new turning point.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That will be the moment you create a new turning point.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A-amazing...
root.m_Talk_DEU: A-amazing...
root.m_Talk_FRA: A-amazing...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Angel, you really do know everything!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Angel, you really do know everything!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Angel, you really do know everything!

root.m_Talk_ENG: And I think you're right!
root.m_Talk_DEU: And I think you're right!
root.m_Talk_FRA: And I think you're right!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't really get this turning point stuff, but there's no time to stand around!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't really get this turning point stuff, but there's no time to stand around!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't really get this turning point stuff, but there's no time to stand around!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we don't stop Swan now, something terrible is going to happen!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we don't stop Swan now, something terrible is going to happen!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we don't stop Swan now, something terrible is going to happen!

root.m_Talk_ENG: And why is that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And why is that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And why is that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...? What do you mean...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...? What do you mean...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...? What do you mean...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I mean, right now Mina... and everyone else are in danger...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I mean, right now Mina... and everyone else are in danger...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I mean, right now Mina... and everyone else are in danger...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Strange. You're fundamentally different from humans.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Strange. You're fundamentally different from humans.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Strange. You're fundamentally different from humans.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So why do you cling to them so desperately?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So why do you cling to them so desperately?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So why do you cling to them so desperately?

root.m_Talk_ENG: B-because...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: B-because...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: B-because...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A being outside of the system rejecting its nature to live a finite life only leads to suffering.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A being outside of the system rejecting its nature to live a finite life only leads to suffering.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A being outside of the system rejecting its nature to live a finite life only leads to suffering.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The void at your core cannot be filled by anything.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The void at your core cannot be filled by anything.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The void at your core cannot be filled by anything.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even so, you wish to remain human?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even so, you wish to remain human?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even so, you wish to remain human?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then allow me to present you with a choice, Fragment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then allow me to present you with a choice, Fragment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then allow me to present you with a choice, Fragment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is a twenty-year gap between us as we speak.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is a twenty-year gap between us as we speak.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is a twenty-year gap between us as we speak.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But through the causality convergence process, I can preserve you indefinitely.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But through the causality convergence process, I can preserve you indefinitely.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But through the causality convergence process, I can preserve you indefinitely.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In that case, twenty years later, you won't descend to Earth.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In that case, twenty years later, you won't descend to Earth.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In that case, twenty years later, you won't descend to Earth.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Causality will converge, turning points will be erased, and countless timelines will vanish.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Causality will converge, turning points will be erased, and countless timelines will vanish.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Causality will converge, turning points will be erased, and countless timelines will vanish.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All the hardships you've faced and will face will never have existed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All the hardships you've faced and will face will never have existed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All the hardships you've faced and will face will never have existed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-what are you saying?
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-what are you saying?
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-what are you saying?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You want to erase everything I've been through just by changing the past twenty years ago?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You want to erase everything I've been through just by changing the past twenty years ago?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You want to erase everything I've been through just by changing the past twenty years ago?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. But only with your consent.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. But only with your consent.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. But only with your consent.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you agree, I can promise you eternal <color=#ffd34c>comfort</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you agree, I can promise you eternal <color=#ffd34c>comfort</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you agree, I can promise you eternal <color=#ffd34c>comfort</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Freedom from the body. For pure mental peace is the highest rest for a sentient being.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Freedom from the body. For pure mental peace is the highest rest for a sentient being.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Freedom from the body. For pure mental peace is the highest rest for a sentient being.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Then
8v that would mean all the memories we shared never even happened
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Then
8v that would mean all the memories we shared never even happened
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Then
8v that would mean all the memories we shared never even happened
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was tough sometimes, but there were good times, too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was tough sometimes, but there were good times, too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was tough sometimes, but there were good times, too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even being trapped in the theater, forgotten by everyone, even myself... that was lonely, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even being trapped in the theater, forgotten by everyone, even myself... that was lonely, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even being trapped in the theater, forgotten by everyone, even myself... that was lonely, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't want to erase the precious memories I made with them...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't want to erase the precious memories I made with them...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't want to erase the precious memories I made with them...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But those memories will end someday.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But those memories will end someday.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But those memories will end someday.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike you, governed by the law of creating a world, humans are finite.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike you, governed by the law of creating a world, humans are finite.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike you, governed by the law of creating a world, humans are finite.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You created a small world through that Exile.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You created a small world through that Exile.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You created a small world through that Exile.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And that small world, too, could not escape inevitable destruction.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And that small world, too, could not escape inevitable destruction.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And that small world, too, could not escape inevitable destruction.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The others are no different, Fragment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The others are no different, Fragment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The others are no different, Fragment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if you survive this trial, the end will still come.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if you survive this trial, the end will still come.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if you survive this trial, the end will still come.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you continue insisting on being human... then when that final moment comes, you'll be alone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you continue insisting on being human... then when that final moment comes, you'll be alone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you continue insisting on being human... then when that final moment comes, you'll be alone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, I'll ask again, Fragment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, I'll ask again, Fragment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, I'll ask again, Fragment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you truly wish for that would make you choose to break away from Tammiel's law?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you truly wish for that would make you choose to break away from Tammiel's law?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you truly wish for that would make you choose to break away from Tammiel's law?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why do you choose to protect them?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why do you choose to protect them?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why do you choose to protect them?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Honestly, I don't really get all this complicated stuff.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Honestly, I don't really get all this complicated stuff.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Honestly, I don't really get all this complicated stuff.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I want to live.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I want to live.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I want to live.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it ends someday, even if we have to say goodbye.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it ends someday, even if we have to say goodbye.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it ends someday, even if we have to say goodbye.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Instead of living every day in fear of an uncertain tomorrow...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Instead of living every day in fear of an uncertain tomorrow...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Instead of living every day in fear of an uncertain tomorrow...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'd rather live today laughing with the people I love.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'd rather live today laughing with the people I love.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'd rather live today laughing with the people I love.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mina, F959licette, and Laika too...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mina, F959licette, and Laika too...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mina, F959licette, and Laika too...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I want to live this moment with everyone who believed in me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I want to live this moment with everyone who believed in me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I want to live this moment with everyone who believed in me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if I have to force it, I'll stay in this world as a human...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if I have to force it, I'll stay in this world as a human...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if I have to force it, I'll stay in this world as a human...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll protect the people I care about with my own power...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll protect the people I care about with my own power...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll protect the people I care about with my own power...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's the only thing I truly wish for!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's the only thing I truly wish for!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's the only thing I truly wish for!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Detecting a turning point in global causality at this moment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Detecting a turning point in global causality at this moment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Detecting a turning point in global causality at this moment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Trial complete. The world where Captain exists has earned another reprieve.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Trial complete. The world where Captain exists has earned another reprieve.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Trial complete. The world where Captain exists has earned another reprieve.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The last condition is for me to appear on Earth twenty years from now and gather those connected to you in one place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The last condition is for me to appear on Earth twenty years from now and gather those connected to you in one place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The last condition is for me to appear on Earth twenty years from now and gather those connected to you in one place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...? What does that mean...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...? What does that mean...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...? What does that mean...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your will is now the will of the world itself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your will is now the will of the world itself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your will is now the will of the world itself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Proof that the Tree of Sephiroth still seeks to restore itself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Proof that the Tree of Sephiroth still seeks to restore itself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Proof that the Tree of Sephiroth still seeks to restore itself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As the Ark, I'm obligated to observe the possibility of you, Fragment of the Tree of Sephiroth.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As the Ark, I'm obligated to observe the possibility of you, Fragment of the Tree of Sephiroth.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As the Ark, I'm obligated to observe the possibility of you, Fragment of the Tree of Sephiroth.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So follow your will and save them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So follow your will and save them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So follow your will and save them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Personification of Sephira.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Personification of Sephira.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Personification of Sephira.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Angel...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Angel...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Angel...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Laika! We can't afford a drawn-out fight with Ozymandias!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Laika! We can't afford a drawn-out fight with Ozymandias!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Laika! We can't afford a drawn-out fight with Ozymandias!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it! You think I don't know that?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it! You think I don't know that?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it! You think I don't know that?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: She won't even let her guard down for a second! There's not a single opening!
root.m_Talk_DEU: She won't even let her guard down for a second! There's not a single opening!
root.m_Talk_FRA: She won't even let her guard down for a second! There's not a single opening!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Here's some fan service for ya!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Here's some fan service for ya!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Here's some fan service for ya!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahh! She grabbed me...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahh! She grabbed me...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahh! She grabbed me...!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Kid...! Just hold on! I'll

root.m_Talk_DEU:
Kid...! Just hold on! I'll
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Kid...! Just hold on! I'll

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff...!*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff...!*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff...!*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Keke, guess Jisoo will always be Jisso. Freakishly strong with zero finesse...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Keke, guess Jisoo will always be Jisso. Freakishly strong with zero finesse...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Keke, guess Jisoo will always be Jisso. Freakishly strong with zero finesse...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still, I can't back down now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still, I can't back down now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still, I can't back down now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not until I land one good hit on that damn woman...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not until I land one good hit on that damn woman...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not until I land one good hit on that damn woman...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ngh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ngh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ngh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait... Did I black out for a second?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait... Did I black out for a second?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait... Did I black out for a second?

root.m_Talk_ENG: S-Swan...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: S-Swan...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: S-Swan...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Incredible...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Incredible...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Incredible...

root.m_Talk_ENG: To think a human body could endure... the Divinity of an angel.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To think a human body could endure... the Divinity of an angel.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To think a human body could endure... the Divinity of an angel.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you talking about...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you talking about...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you talking about...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That girl, Noelle Wright, is not the vessel...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That girl, Noelle Wright, is not the vessel...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That girl, Noelle Wright, is not the vessel...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But there's no way... a normal human could bear the Divinity...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But there's no way... a normal human could bear the Divinity...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But there's no way... a normal human could bear the Divinity...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Noelle...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Noelle...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Noelle...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's right, Noelle!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's right, Noelle!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's right, Noelle!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What happened to her...? Don't tell me...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What happened to her...? Don't tell me...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What happened to her...? Don't tell me...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Look, Wolf.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Look, Wolf.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Look, Wolf.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're witnessing the moment of an angel's descent.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're witnessing the moment of an angel's descent.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're witnessing the moment of an angel's descent.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Angel's descent...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Angel's descent...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Angel's descent...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Noelle...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Noelle...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Noelle...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that... really Noelle...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that... really Noelle...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that... really Noelle...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Angel...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Angel...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Angel...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for listening to my selfish wish.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for listening to my selfish wish.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for listening to my selfish wish.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just like you said, my will is the world's will.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just like you said, my will is the world's will.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just like you said, my will is the world's will.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To protect everyone who believed in me until the very end, I'll borrow your form, just for a little while.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To protect everyone who believed in me until the very end, I'll borrow your form, just for a little while.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To protect everyone who believed in me until the very end, I'll borrow your form, just for a little while.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So please, lend me your strength, Angel.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So please, lend me your strength, Angel.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So please, lend me your strength, Angel.
